items.caption: Three vintage-style metal canisters repurposed as planters, each containing a small potted plant with white flowers and green foliage. They are mounted on a wooden shelf against a white wall.

Three metal canisters with plants, each labeled with a name. the canisters are placed on a wooden surface, and the plants appear to be small, leafy herbs. the text "tin can herb garden" is visible, suggesting a creative repurposing of tin cans for gardening. the style of the image is a straightforward, clear photograph with a focus on the subject matter.
a closeup of metal tools and a cloth.
